'''鈭歭-g-ch''' ('''lagacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamicize|dynamicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamicize|dynamicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| lagacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagachithi|lagachithi]] || [[word:lagachiji|lagachiji]] || [[word:lagachishi|lagachishi]] || [[word:lagachi|lagachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagachuthuth|lagachuthuth]] || [[word:lagachujuj|lagachujuj]] || [[word:lagachushush|lagachushush]] || [[word:lagach|lagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagachuthu|lagachuthu]] || [[word:lagachuju|lagachuju]] || [[word:lagachushu|lagachushu]] || [[word:lagachu|lagachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagachufuth|lagachufuth]] || [[word:lagachufuj|lagachufuj]] || [[word:lagachufush|lagachufush]] || [[word:lagachuf|lagachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagachethe|lagachethe]] || [[word:lagacheje|lagacheje]] || [[word:lagacheshe|lagacheshe]] || [[word:lagache|lagache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagachothoth|lagachothoth]] || [[word:lagachojoj|lagachojoj]] || [[word:lagachoshosh|lagachoshosh]] || [[word:lagach|lagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagachotho|lagachotho]] || [[word:lagachojo|lagachojo]] || [[word:lagachosho|lagachosho]] || [[word:lagacho|lagacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagachofoth|lagachofoth]] || [[word:lagachofoj|lagachofoj]] || [[word:lagachofosh|lagachofosh]] || [[word:lagachof|lagachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lagach忙th忙|lagach忙th忙]] || [[word:lagach忙j忙|lagach忙j忙]] || [[word:lagach忙sh忙|lagach忙sh忙]] || [[word:lagach忙|lagach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lagachathath|lagachathath]] || [[word:lagachajaj|lagachajaj]] || [[word:lagachashash|lagachashash]] || [[word:lagach|lagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lagachatha|lagachatha]] || [[word:lagachaja|lagachaja]] || [[word:lagachasha|lagachasha]] || [[word:lagacha|lagacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lagachafath|lagachafath]] || [[word:lagachafaj|lagachafaj]] || [[word:lagachafash|lagachafash]] || [[word:lagachaf|lagachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lagachasha|lagachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golagachasha|golagachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilagachasha|gokilagachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lagachn眉sha|lagachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golagachnkn眉sha|golagachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilagachn眉sha|gokilagachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lagachsh毛sha|lagachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golagachnksh毛sha|golagachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilagachsh毛sha|gokilagachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagachrosha|lagachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagachnkrosha|golagachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagachrosha|gokilagachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lagachmusha|lagachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golagachnkmusha|golagachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagachmusha|gokilagachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lagachsherasha|lagachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golagachnksherasha|golagachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilagachsherasha|gokilagachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lagachngasha|lagachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golagachnkngasha|golagachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilagachngasha|gokilagachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lagachyasha|lagachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golagachnkyasha|golagachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilagachyasha|gokilagachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lagachyamasha|lagachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golagachnkyamasha|golagachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilagachyamasha|gokilagachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagachn眉sh毛sha|lagachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagachnkn眉sh毛sha|golagachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagachn眉sh毛sha|gokilagachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagachn眉rosha|lagachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagachnkn眉rosha|golagachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagachn眉rosha|gokilagachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagachn眉musha|lagachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagachnkn眉musha|golagachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagachn眉musha|gokilagachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagachsh毛n眉sha|lagachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagachnksh毛n眉sha|golagachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagachsh毛n眉sha|gokilagachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagachsh毛rosha|lagachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagachnksh毛rosha|golagachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagachsh毛rosha|gokilagachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagachsh毛musha|lagachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagachnksh毛musha|golagachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagachsh毛musha|gokilagachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagachron眉sha|lagachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagachnkron眉sha|golagachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagachron眉sha|gokilagachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagachrosh毛sha|lagachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagachnkrosh毛sha|golagachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagachrosh毛sha|gokilagachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagachromusha|lagachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagachnkromusha|golagachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagachromusha|gokilagachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lagachmun眉sha|lagachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golagachnkmun眉sha|golagachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilagachmun眉sha|gokilagachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lagachmush毛sha|lagachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golagachnkmush毛sha|golagachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilagachmush毛sha|gokilagachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lagachmurosha|lagachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golagachnkmurosha|golagachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilagachmurosha|gokilagachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lagach|lagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:l忙g忙ch|l忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holagach|holagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hol忙g忙ch|hol忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholagach|hoholagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohol忙g忙ch|hohol忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉lagach|n眉lagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉l忙g忙ch|n眉l忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉lagach|n眉n眉lagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉l忙g忙ch|n眉n眉l忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂lagach|n茂lagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂l忙g忙ch|n茂l忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂lagach|n茂n茂lagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂l忙g忙ch|n茂n茂l忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulagach|lulagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lul忙g忙ch|lul忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululagach|lululagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulul忙g忙ch|lulul忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilagach|lilagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lil忙g忙ch|lil忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililagach|lililagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilil忙g忙ch|lilil忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolagach|kolagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kol忙g忙ch|kol忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolagach|kokolagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokol忙g忙ch|kokol忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelagach|kelagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kel忙g忙ch|kel忙g忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelagach|kekelagach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekel忙g忙ch|kekel忙g忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
